---
title: "Beyond classical statistics"
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Bayesian inference

{{< revealjs "slides/11_Bayes.html" >}}

## Machine Learning

{{< revealjs "slides/12_TwoCultures.html" >}}


## Further reading

- S. Holmes and W. Huber. Modern Statistics for Modern Biology. [Chapter 2](https://www.huber.embl.de/msmb/02-chap.html#bayesian-thinking).
- Efron, Hastie. Computer Age Statistical Inference: Algorithms, Evidence, and Data Science. [Chapter 16](https://hastie.su.domains/CASI/)
- Leo Breiman (2001) [Statistical Modeling: The Two Cultures](https://projecteuclid.org/journals/statistical-science/volume-16/issue-3/Statistical-Modeling--The-Two-Cultures-with-comments-and-a/10.1214/ss/1009213726.full). _Statistical Science_
